artPrompt: A widescreen film-still of a goblin orator mid-tirade atop a wobbling crate in a chaotic town square at night, mouth wide open, arms flung outward, veins straining as he refuses to stop talking, his small frame haloed by an indestructible aura of bonfire glow; embers and confetti swirl, rioting silhouettes and overturned boxes behind in flame orange and night-black smoke, gleeful mayhem, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: Filibuster Firebrand
text:
Filibuster (As long as you keep talking out loud about anything at all, this creature has indestructible. If you stop, the effect ends.)
Whenever Filibuster Firebrand attacks, it deals 1 damage to each opponent for each word in this card's name. (That's two.)
flavorText: He has been recognized by the chair and refuses to be un-recognized.
